Construction management,
simplified.

The all-in-one platform for construction teams. Plan projects, track tasks, manage workers, and ensure safety — from the office to the job site.

Everything you need to run your sites

Project Management

Track budgets, timelines, and progress across all your construction sites.

Task Tracking

Assign, schedule, and monitor tasks with real-time status updates.

Worker Management

Manage crews, certifications, hours, and payroll in one place.

Safety & Compliance

Log incidents, schedule inspections, and stay OSHA-ready.

Analytics

Get insights on costs, timelines, productivity, and safety metrics.

Real-time Alerts

Push, SMS, and email notifications keep your team in sync.

Ready to streamline your builds?

Join hundreds of construction teams using BuildTrack to deliver on time and on budget.
